title: The Departure Of The Good Demon.
content:
What can I do in poetry
    Now the good spirit's gone from me?
    Why, nothing now but lonely sit
    And over-read what I have writ.
meaning:
"The Departure Of The Good Demon." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
